DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/.description: Deletes a repository and schedules cleanup of its backing data.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/nam.description: Lists Artifacts namespaces for an account.
Returns raw bytes for an immutable Git blob object. Blob responses are cacheable forever by hash.

content-length.description: Size of the response body in bytes.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/nam.description: Returns decoded metadata for an immutable Git commit object. Commit responses are cacheable forever by hash.
Returns raw bytes for a file resolved by ref and path.

parameters.description: Git ref, branch, tag, or commit hash.
parameters.name: ref

content-length.description: Size of the response body in bytes.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/nam.description: Returns commit metadata walking backwards from a ref, branch, tag, or HEAD.

parameters.description: Git ref, branch, tag, or commit hash. Defaults to HEAD.
parameters.name: ref

GET /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/nam.description: Returns file bytes resolved by ref and path, with a sniffed content type and browser-safe response headers.

parameters.description: Git ref, branch, tag, or 40-character commit hash.
parameters.name: ref

200.description: File bytes with sniffed Content-Type and browser-safe response headers.

content-length.description: Size of the response body in bytes.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/nam.summary: Read a raw file with content type

GET /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/nam.description: Returns decoded entries for an immutable Git tree object. Tree responses are cacheable forever by hash.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/artifacts/na.description: Creates a Git-compatible Artifacts repository in a namespace.
Forks a source repository into a new repository.
Imports an HTTPS Git repository into an Artifacts repository.
Creates a scoped Git token for a repository.
